name: Express Kebab for the Lich King
description: Goblin courier Pip delivers a royal kebab through chaotic streets. Can you beat the clock or taste bad reviews forever?!

hook.title: Cold Kebab, Hot Deadline
hook.text: You are Pip Pockets, goblin courier, and your boss just handed you a royal kebab order for the Lich King. It is already getting cold and somehow humming ominously.

choices.label: Sprint through the fish market
choices.hint: Fast path, strong smells, unknown puddles.

critFail.text: Sprint through the fish market goes spectacularly wrong and a nearby goat joins the argument.

fail.text: Sprint through the fish market mostly fails, but at least the witnesses are too confused to boo.

mixed.text: Sprint through the fish market kind of works and kind of explodes, which feels on brand.

success.text: Sprint through the fish market works cleanly and the crowd starts chanting your nickname.

crit.text: Sprint through the fish market becomes tavern legend by sunrise and even your enemies clap politely.

critFail.text: Borrow a cabbage cart goes spectacularly wrong and a nearby goat joins the argument.

success.text: Borrow a cabbage cart works cleanly and the crowd starts chanting your nickname.

crit.text: Borrow a cabbage cart becomes tavern legend by sunrise and even your enemies clap politely.

endings.title: The Golden Skewer
endings.text: Your delivery is flawless, the court erupts, and the Lich King names a holiday after your route. Bards immediately exaggerate everything by at least 400 percent.

endings.title: Crowned by Sauce
endings.text: The sentient sauce declares you chosen and crowns you with a glowing ladle. Your autograph now has a waiting list.

endings.title: Courier Union Hero
endings.text: You negotiate better wages mid-ceremony and win. Every courier in town buys you dinner for a week.

endings.title: Marshal of Midnight Deliveries
endings.text: The necropolis appoints you official night marshal of logistics. You get a cape with reflective trim.

endings.title: Ballad of Route Nine
endings.text: Your route is turned into a tavern anthem sung every closing hour. Even Donna admits the chorus slaps.

endings.title: Warmth Wins
endings.text: You deliver a still-warm meal and restore peace between undead nobles and living cooks. The city calls it your cleanest miracle.

endings.title: Savior of the Frog Rain
endings.text: You escort citizens safely through falling frogs before finishing the job. People start waving when you pass.

endings.title: Family Reunion
endings.text: You return the runaway nephew safely and spare him the worst etiquette lecture. The court grants you a permanent guest pass.

endings.title: Honest Courier Ending
endings.text: You refuse easy scams and finish on merit. It is less flashy, but everyone trusts you with important deliveries now.

endings.title: Public Toast
endings.text: The tavern hosts a toast in your honor and your boss finally learns your full name. It only took mild chaos.

endings.title: Banana Peel Doctrine
endings.text: You win through improvised nonsense and questionable fruit placement. The court rules it technically legal.

endings.title: Dance Toll Champion
endings.text: Your bridge dance goes viral and you accidentally start a toll-performance festival. Nobody remembers why.

endings.title: Pickle Doctrine
endings.text: You convince the Lich King that pickles are a philosophical statement. A new royal menu category is born.

endings.title: Bards v. You
endings.text: You beat the bards in court by representing yourself and bringing props. The verdict is confusing but favorable.

endings.title: Sauce for Mayor
endings.text: You and the sentient sauce launch a local campaign and nearly win. Your slogan was weirdly effective.

endings.title: Eternal Lunch Shift
endings.text: The delivery succeeds, but a minor curse binds you to lunch rush forever. The tips are decent, the hours are haunted.

endings.title: Marked by the Fork
endings.text: The Sacred Fork glows and brands your glove with a warning sigil. Doors open for you, but mirrors heckle you.

endings.title: Cold Kebab Prophecy
endings.text: You complete the route at a terrible cosmic price and now hear whispers whenever kebab cools below room temperature.

endings.title: Frog Omen
endings.text: Frogs continue falling only when you are on shift. Scholars call it weather, priests call it your vibe.

endings.title: The Ladle Oath
endings.text: A cursed ladle chooses you and refuses to leave your side. It critiques every sauce decision you make.

endings.title: The Lost Receipt
endings.text: You finish everything but lose the receipt, so nobody believes you. History forgets, your knees remember.

endings.title: Ate the Evidence
endings.text: You panic and eat part of the order. The court fines you in napkins and public disappointment.

endings.title: One Boot Destiny
endings.text: Your boot explodes on the stairs and momentum carries you into a decorative urn. At least the urn was insured.

endings.title: Fired Then Rehired
endings.text: You are dramatically fired and quietly rehired before sunset because no one else knows route nine.

endings.title: Still Breathing, Technically
endings.text: The kebab arrives eventually, your reputation does not, and the city moves on. You survive and call that a win.
